name: Hyakkaou Student Council
description:
Group chat consisting of the characters: Kirari Momobami, Ririka Momobami, Sayaka Igarashi, Midari Ikishima, Yuriko Nishinotouin, Yumemi Yumemite, Runa Yomozuki, Yumeko Jabami and Mary Saotome.
(Based on the fanfiction 'Council's Pet' by immentallyill on ao3)
creator: Anna Renaldi
